description: GET /v1/metrics/:id/series — role: viewer/owner. Reads the persistent, tiered metric_series table (v1-architecture.md §1.2.1) — durable across DO eviction, non-folded (never bumps space_revision). Response is MetricSeriesPoint[] (openapi.yaml #/components/schemas/MetricSeriesPoint).

error_response_400_invalid_range.note: range must be one of 1h | 6h | 1d | 1w | 1m | 1y (the frozen SERIES_RANGES). Short ranges read the raw tier (720-point cap); 1w/1m read hourly (768-bucket cap); 1y reads daily (400-bucket cap).

notes: Points are oldest-first, one per bucket, each carrying the bucket's last value. This is derived history — a metric.frame append writes it best-effort and NEVER increments space_revision (v1-architecture.md §1.2.1, §7.2).
Unlike GET /v1/metrics/:id (the in-memory best-effort cache), this survives DO eviction because metric_series is a durable table.
